name: Half Alive
short_description: Half Alive is a low poly wave-based survival game where every decision matters. Face hordes of zombies solo or in co-op, tackle unique challenges, and customize your arsenal. Fight, adapt, and survive.
detailed_description:
Survive. Adapt. Conquer.

Half Alive is a fast-paced, wave-based zombie survival game where every choice counts. Face off against the undead, whether you’re going solo or teaming up with friends. Upgrade your weapons, adapt your strategy, and push your limits to survive.

How Long Can You Last?

Start with nothing but a simple handgun and a small, confined space. Survive wave after wave of increasingly tougher zombies, earn money, and use it to unlock powerful weapons and expand your battlefield. But be warned—the longer you survive, the harder it gets.

Weapons, Upgrades & Perks

Unlock a variety of weapons and enhancements to keep the undead at bay. From pistols to assault rifles, customize your arsenal to fit your strategy. Use upgrade stations to boost your weapons and gain an edge with temporary power-ups and perks.

Multiplayer & Customization

In multiplayer, death isn’t permanent. Teammates can revive you within 30 seconds—keep fighting, or spectate until the next wave. Customize your experience with character and weapon skins as you progress.

Are You Ready to Face the Horde?

With evolving challenges, random wave types, and continuous updates, Half Alive offers an intense and dynamic survival experience. The undead aren’t waiting—lock and load.
